concerns.text: Task T080 (reproducibility verification script) is placed in Phase 2 before the majority of modules that need to respect the global SEED are implemented (e.g., extractor, reconstructor, validator). This creates a consumer‑before‑producer ordering violation.

Task ID T080 is duplicated – it appears both in Phase 2 (reproducibility script) and again in Phase X (SC‑001 verification). Duplicate IDs break the deterministic task ordering and can cause ambiguity in execution.

Tasks T051‑T056 (documentation, type hints, performance optimisation, edge‑case tests, benchmark logging, release tagging) are not anchored to any functional requirement or success criterion, making them orphaned and potentially out‑of‑scope.
